tasks.body_preview: - Assessment: 5 of last 10 CI runs cancelled with Node 20 deprecation warnings on `actions/cache@v4`, `actions/checkout@v4`, and `actions/create-github-app-token@v1`. - GitHub deprecation notice: Node 20 on Actions runners is being deprecated (https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/). - Impact: ~50% session
tasks.expected_evidence: Next evolution run (after this session) completes without Node 20 deprecation cancellation. The cancellation rate drops from ~50% to near zero. Future trajectory snapshots show fewer `cancelled` run conclusions. Implementation Notes: The evolve workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` at line 31 and `actions/cache@v4` at line 49. tasks.title: Fix CI cancellations from GitHub Actions Node 20 deprecation
